channel.title: Versions on WordPress FAQ
channel.description: Recent content in Versions on WordPress FAQ

item.title: Managing WordPress Version Updates and Theme Compatibility
item.description: Always backup your site before performing any WordPress core, theme, or plugin updates to prevent potential data loss or site conflicts. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Theme update notifications for discontinued themes Authorization header missing errors Permalinks flushing concerns Community Q&A How do I stop WordPress from asking me to update a theme? You can manually edit the version number in your theme’s style.css file to a very high number, which prevents the system from detecting available updates.
